# JustEmbedMe

> Hosted, OpenAI-compatible API for frontier open-source text embedding models that out-rank OpenAI's hosted embeddings on the Multilingual MTEB leaderboard. Billed per token, payable by card or USDC. Because the weights are open and permanent, your vector index can never be orphaned by a model deprecation — and you can always self-host the exact same model. Status: launching soon.

JustEmbedMe is a product of Joza Solutions LLC. It hosts state-of-the-art open-source embedding models behind a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint, so existing clients work with a base-URL swap.

## Why it exists
The best embedding models today are open source. OpenAI hasn't shipped a new embeddings model in years, and Google's — while excellent — come from a company with a long track record of retiring products, making them a risky foundation for a long-lived vector index. Open weights are the safest way to keep a RAG pipeline or embeddings dataset robust over time. Hosting these models is expensive, so JustEmbedMe hosts them for you. When you're ready to self-host, we publish the exact specs we run and what they cost. Until then, you skip the monthly GPU bill.

## What it offers
- OpenAI-compatible endpoint: POST https://api.justembedme.com/v1/embeddings
- Models: microsoft/harrier-oss-v1-0.6b — 596M params, 100+ languages, MIT-licensed. A top-tier small open model: at release it sat around #10 on the Multilingual MTEB v2 leaderboard (~69.0 Mean(Task)), ahead of OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small (~64) on the same board. Larger Harrier variants available, up to harrier-oss-v1-27b. More open models to follow.
- Note: leaderboard ranks and scores change over time — see the live MTEB leaderboard (https://huggingface.co/spaces/mteb/leaderboard) for current numbers.
- Pricing: simple per-token, published transparently; free tier to try
- Payment: card (Stripe) or USDC micropayments for agents (x402 on Base)
- Durability: every model is open-weight and permanent; self-host guide and cost breakdown provided

## For AI agents
- Discoverable via x402 Bazaar / Agentic.Market and as an MCP tool
- Pay-per-call in USDC over HTTP 402 — no account required
- Machine-readable pricing and OpenAPI spec at launch

## Links
- Site: https://justembedme.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/orgs/justembedme
- Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/justembedme
- Contact: hello@justembedme.com

## Notes
- Not affiliated with, or endorsed by, the MTEB benchmark or its maintainers.
